content: We can hypothesize that integrating multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into the original Self-Refine framework will unlock a step-change improvement in iterative self-improvement for LLMs, without requiring any additional supervised training or external data that breaks Self-Refine's core advantage. This adapted framework would first sample diverse conflicting initial outputs from the LLM, then use the Self-Refine iteration loop to refine toward a higher-quality output that resolves these cross-perspective inconsistencies.
